message.content:
@startuml
title Project - Staff - Update

participant "Client" as Client
participant "ProjectService" as ProjectService
participant "RedisCache" as RedisCache
participant "Kafka" as Kafka
participant "PersisterService" as PersisterService
participant "IndexerService" as IndexerService
participant "ErrorService" as ErrorService
participant "ElasticSearch" as Elasticsearch
participant "Database" as Database

Client ..> ProjectService : /project/staff/v1/_update

alt request validation fails
    ProjectService -> Client : Request validation failed
    ProjectService -> Client : HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
else
    alt record doesn't exist
        ProjectService -> RedisCache : Search record based on serverGeneratedId
        RedisCache -> ProjectService : 0 rows
        ProjectService -> RedisCache : Search record based on serverGeneratedId
        RedisCache -> ProjectService : 0 row
        ProjectService -> Client : Error Code: RECORD_NOT_FOUND
        ProjectService -> Client : HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
    else
        alt record doesn't exists in cache
            ProjectService -> RedisCache : Search record based on serverGeneratedId
            RedisCache -> ProjectService : 0 rows
            ProjectService -> RedisCache : Search record based on serverGeneratedId
            RedisCache -> ProjectService : 1 row
            ProjectService -> RedisCache : 1 record
        else
            alt incorrect rowVersion
                ProjectService -> RedisCache : Compare rowVersion between request and db
                RedisCache -> ProjectService : Incorrect rowVersion [request: should be +1 only]
                ProjectService -> Client : Error Code: BAD_REQUEST
                ProjectService -> Client : HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
            else
                ProjectService -> RedisCache : Compare rowVersion between request and db
                RedisCache -> ProjectService : rowVersion in request = rowVersion in db + 1
                ProjectService -> RedisCache : Project Staff Data /update_topic
                ProjectService -> Kafka : Update new record in cache against serverGeneratedId
                ProjectService -> Client : HttpStatus: 202 ACCEPTED
            end
        end
    end
end

async
    ProjectService -> RedisCache : Consume Project Staff Data
    RedisCache -> ProjectService : Consume Project Staff Data
    ProjectService -> PersisterService : Store Project Staff Data
    PersisterService -> Elasticsearch : Update Project Staff Data
@enduml
